projectDescription: An open-source, self-hostable AI-powered wiki generator that automatically creates interactive documentation, diagrams, and Q&A interfaces for any GitHub, GitLab, or Bitbucket repository.
keyFeatures: Instant AI-powered wiki generation for GitHub, GitLab, and Bitbucket repositories
Automatic Mermaid diagram generation to visualize code architecture and data flow
Ask feature: RAG-powered chat interface for querying repository content
DeepResearch: multi-turn AI research process for in-depth topic investigation
Multiple LLM provider support: Google Gemini, OpenAI, OpenRouter, Azure OpenAI, AWS Bedrock, Ollama, DashScope
Flexible embedding providers: OpenAI, Google AI, Ollama, Bedrock
Private repository support via personal access tokens
Wiki export in Markdown and JSON formats
Authorization mode for controlled access to wiki generation
publicApiSurface: GET /models/config — List available LLM providers and models
GET /auth/status — Check if authorization mode is enabled
POST /export/wiki — Export wiki pages as Markdown or JSON
GET /local_repo/structure — Get file tree for a local repository
